baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Banks distrust standalone tech. Loan capacity is suppressed until vertical integration is achieved. No income — growth is the only return.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a TECHNOLOGY MIDSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 4. Lenders gain confidence when infrastructure supports a live platform.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own an ENERGY UPSTREAM asset, reduce your stress by 1. Co-located power infrastructure reduces operational risk perception.

flavourText: The pipes nobody sees. The margin nobody envies.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Banks distrust standalone software. baseLoanCapacity is near-zero — integration with UPSTREAM infrastructure unlocks lender access.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a TECHNOLOGY UPSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 4. Infrastructure backing converts intangible software value into bankable collateral.
If you also own a TECHNOLOGY DOWNSTREAM asset, add +1 to all positive delta outcomes on this asset's update roll. A distribution channel amplifies platform revenue.

flavourText: Twelve integrations. Three customers. Infinite runway.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Banks distrust consumer apps entirely. Loan capacity is minimal — this card is a pure growth bet with no income and no lending floor.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a TECHNOLOGY MIDSTREAM asset, this asset's value update roll can never produce a delta lower than -2. Platform infrastructure buffers consumer volatility.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own a MEDIA_ENTERTAINMENT DOWNSTREAM asset, add +1 to all positive delta outcomes on this asset's update roll. Content drives acquisition; acquisition drives value.

flavourText: User growth is up. Revenue is a Q3 conversation.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Banks distrust standalone tech infrastructure at scale. Loan capacity remains weak without a confirmed software stack. No income — paper wealth only.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a TECHNOLOGY MIDSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 5. Enterprise SaaS backed by owned infrastructure is the one combination lenders will fund.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own an ENERGY UPSTREAM asset, reduce your stress by 1. Captive power supply at data centre scale is a structural moat — markets reward it.

flavourText: We don't sell compute. We sell certainty.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Banks distrust enterprise software without physical collateral. No income — the entire return is value appreciation. Integration is mandatory for meaningful leverage.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a TECHNOLOGY UPSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 5. Owned infrastructure converts recurring software revenue into reserve-based lending.
If you also own a TECHNOLOGY DOWNSTREAM asset, this asset's loan repayment roll triggers only on a 1 (instead of 1-2). Full stack ownership signals durability to lenders.

flavourText: Fortune 500 contracts. Series D valuations. No profit in sight.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Banks treat marketplace models as uncollateralised until scale is proven. Near-zero loan capacity standalone. Highest growth ceiling in the Technology Tier 2 set.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a TECHNOLOGY MIDSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 4. An owned platform layer transforms a marketplace from a spreadsheet into infrastructure.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own a MEDIA_ENTERTAINMENT MIDSTREAM asset, add +2 to all positive delta outcomes on this asset's update roll. Distribution platform synergies create compounding demand loops.

flavourText: Take rate: 3%. Scale: everything. That's the whole pitch.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Banks treat AI platforms as uncollateralised speculation. baseLoanCapacity is near-zero standalone — the lowest in the game. No income. The entire value proposition is explosive appreciation or total collapse.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: If you also own a TECHNOLOGY UPSTREAM asset, this asset's loan capacity increases by 6. Owned compute infrastructure is the only thing that makes an AI company bankable.
If you also own a TECHNOLOGY DOWNSTREAM asset, add +2 to all positive delta outcomes on this asset's update roll. Distribution turns a model into a product.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: If you also own a FINANCE UPSTREAM asset, once per year you may move any number of loan tokens onto this asset from any other asset at no cost, regardless of capacity. Quantitative capital markets treat AI as a distinct asset class.

flavourText: The model is the moat. The moat is the company. The company is the debt.
